top_signals.title: Indonesian Markets Slump on Commodity Export Control Speculation
top_signals.summary: Indonesian markets fell as speculation mounted that the government will centralize commodity exports to control capital flows and shore up a plunging currency. Palm oil futures rose.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
